evt_024.label: DropAtInf
evt_024.basis: Party C did not submit a revised indication or reiterate its prior $16.00 to $17.00 per share indication, so the bidder dropped at its prior informal level.
evt_024.source_text: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest of an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share nor did it specify any reasons in connection therewith.

evt_021.label: Formal
evt_021.basis: Proposal after final round announcement/deadline with no informal signals.

evt_025.label: Formal
evt_025.basis: Proposal after final round announcement/deadline with no informal signals.

cycle_1.basis: First formal proposal in cycle: evt_021.

initiation_judgment.basis: The board initiated the process by authorizing BofA Merrill Lynch to explore strategic alternatives and contact Party A before any bidder approach was recorded.
initiation_judgment.source_text: at an in-person meeting of the Board on April 5, 2013, the Board discussed the sale of CSC to Pamplona as well as industry-wide merger and acquisition activity and dynamics, and authorized Mac-Gray management to work with BofA Merrill Lynch to explore transactional opportunities that might be available to Mac-Gray, including opportunities with another strategic party, whom we refer to as Party A, in the laundry facilities management industry.

advisor_bofa_merrill_lynch.source_text: The Transaction Committee recommended to the Board that Mac-Gray engage BofA Merrill Lynch as Mac-Gray's financial advisor for the Board's exploration of strategic alternatives, including a potential sale process.

advisor_goodwin_procter.source_text: representatives from BofA Merrill Lynch and Goodwin Procter LLP, outside legal counsel to Mac-Gray, were also in attendance for all or portions of the meeting.

advisor_kirkland.source_text: Goodwin Procter delivered to Kirkland & Ellis LLP, outside legal counsel to CSC/Pamplona, whom we refer to as Kirkland, the initial draft of the merger agreement.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 18 financial bidders (including Party B and Party C) entered into confidentiality agreements with Mac-Gray.
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly because the extract preserves Party B, Party C, and a grouped actor representing 16 other unnamed financial bidders.

count_reconciliation.assertion: two strategic bidders (Party A and CSC/Pamplona) entered into confidentiality agreements with Mac-Gray.
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly across Party A and CSC/Pamplona.
